facebook.caption: This place fixes a bad travel day. INK 360 Rooftop Bar sits on top of the InterContinental. Cocktails above the South China Sea. 4.5 stars across 515 reviews. The crowd is small. The sky is big. Budget $40-80 per person and go at sunset. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Drinks poured 10 floors up. INK 360 Rooftop Bar at the InterContinental, Phú Quốc. 4.5 stars. That view does something to you. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.caption: This place fixes a bad travel day. INK 360 Rooftop Bar, InterContinental Phú Quốc. 4.5★, 515 reviews. Go at sunset. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Rooftop cocktails. South China Sea below. INK 360 at the InterContinental Phú Quốc. 4.5 stars. Worth every dollar.

tiktok.caption: The rooftop bar Phu Quoc doesn't talk about enough. INK 360. Sunset hits different up here. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocBars #VietnamTravel

video_script.hook: This fixes a bad travel day.
scenes: Wide shot: sea stretching to horizon
Sun dropping behind water, golden light
Guest raises glass toward the view
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
